Reunion Weekend

Three days of celebration, community, and connection

FRI Oct 2
Parade & Football Game

🎊 Class of 1991 Parade & Raiders Game

🕐 Times: Parade in afternoon · Game at 7:00 PM

📍 Locations: Downtown Rockingham (Parade) · Richmond Senior High Stadium (Game)

👑 Led by: Toni Roscoe Maples

📋 Activities: Class parade down main street · Pick up reunion packets at gate · Watch the Raiders play · Walk the track at halftime · Reconnect with classmates

SAT Oct 3
Family Day of Service + Evening Celebration

🤝 Morning Community Service — 9 AM to 12 PM

📍 Location: TBD  |  👥 Led by: Calandra McDonald

Give back to our community together as a class.

🎒 Backpack Giveaway — 1 PM to 4 PM

📍 Location: TBD  |  👥 Led by: Chewuna Patterson

Help local students with school supplies.

🎭 Great Gatsby Evening Celebration — 7 PM to 12 AM

📍 Location: Leak Street Cultural Center GYMNASIUM

👔 Dress Code: Gatsby Themed or Whatever You Desire — don't let attire stop you! Prizes for best dressed!

🔞 Age: 35 and up

🕯️ Moment of Silence: 7:30 – 7:45 PM honoring classmates who have transitioned
SUN Oct 4
Reunion Brunch

🥂 Farewell Brunch — 10 AM to 2 PM

📍 Location: TBD

Food, fellowship, and words of inspiration from a special guest speaker.

📝 Note: Locations marked TBD will be updated here as confirmed. Contact us at 91raidercommittee@gmail.com with questions.

📋 Cancellation Policy

We understand life happens. We will do our best to honor cancellations with a 72-hour email notice sent to 91raidercommittee@gmail.com.

Text Updates

Never miss an announcement — get updates by text

📱

Stay in the loop

Get text alerts for schedule updates, location confirmations, reminders, and reunion day info. We'll never spam you.

By submitting, you agree to receive text messages from the Class of 1991 Reunion Committee. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

💡 Tip: Follow our Facebook group and join the email list via the RSVP form for the most complete updates. Texts are for urgent day-of announcements.

FAQ

Common questions about our 35th reunion

💰 What are the ticket prices?

Single Class Member: $35 (Early Bird through June 15, 2026) · Couples Class Member: $60 (Early Bird) · Non-Class Member Guest: $45 · Additional Guests: $30/person for Saturday night (21 and up). Prices increase after June 15.

💳 What deposit is required?

A $25 nonrefundable deposit secures your RSVP for Saturday events. It applies toward your ticket or class t-shirt. Pay via Cash App ($classof1991reunion) or Venmo (@raiderclassreunion91). Include your full name in the memo.

📍 Where is the Saturday night party?

The Great Gatsby Party is at Leak Street Cultural Center GYMNASIUM, Saturday October 3, 2026, 7 PM – 12 AM. 21 and up only.

🎭 What's the dress code?

Gatsby themed or whatever makes you feel fabulous — feathers, pearls, suspenders, vintage glam. Don't let attire stop you! Prizes for best dressed!

🎊 What happens Friday?

Join the Class of 1991 Parade down main street led by Toni Roscoe Maples, then head to the stadium for the Friday night football game at 7 PM. Pick up your reunion packets at the gate!

🤝 Tell me about community service

Saturday morning: service projects led by Calandra McDonald (9 AM–12 PM). Saturday afternoon: backpack giveaway for local students led by Chewuna Patterson (1–4 PM). Locations TBD.

🍳 What about Sunday brunch?

Sunday October 4, 10 AM – 2 PM. A relaxed final gathering with food, fellowship, and inspiration from a special guest speaker. Location TBD.

📧 How do I contact the committee?

Email us at 91raidercommittee@gmail.com. For urgent matters, use the Facebook group.
